properties.Observation: During the rainy season, a very high volume of water flows along this canal, causing erosion of the stream banks.
properties.Description:
Planting Kumbuk and Bamboo trees

Vegetative cover improving along the canal with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and planting at 3.5m x 3.5 m grid interval

Repl
